creator: glimp@live.com
text:
Hi !


I proposed a way to fix. There has been a misunderstanding. The "Errata Corrige" that I submitted was to state that the problem is _similar_ not _same_ as the one in the forum. I did not want to close the PR. 


BTW A __temporary fix__ would be to open vidinput_v4l2.cxx located somewhere in a subdirectory of /usr/ports/devel/pwlib/work and change '__u32' into 'uint32_t' for 2 times in that file.


Can this PR be submitted to the maintainer ?


d
